battleaxe.name: Battleaxe
battleaxe.masteryEff: On a hit, Con save (DC 14) or Prone.

dagger.name: Dagger
dagger.masteryEff: Make the Light off-hand attack as part of the Attack action.

greataxe.name: Greataxe
greataxe.masteryEff: On a hit, also strike a second creature within 5 ft.

handaxe.name: Handaxe
handaxe.masteryEff: Hit + damage: Advantage on your next attack vs the target.

handcrossbow.name: Hand Crossbow
handcrossbow.masteryEff: Hit + damage: Advantage on your next attack vs the target.

javelin.name: Javelin
javelin.masteryEff: Hit + damage: target's Speed drops 10 ft.

longbow.name: Longbow
longbow.masteryEff: Hit + damage: target's Speed drops 10 ft.

longsword.name: Longsword
longsword.masteryEff: Hit + damage: target has Disadvantage on its next attack.

mace.name: Mace
mace.masteryEff: Hit + damage: the target has Disadvantage on its next attack roll.

maul.name: Maul
maul.masteryEff: On a hit, Con save or Prone (two-handed).

quarterstaff.name: Quarterstaff
quarterstaff.masteryEff: On a hit, the target makes a Constitution save (DC 8 + Str + Prof) or has the Prone condition.

scimitar.name: Scimitar
scimitar.masteryEff: Make the Light off-hand attack as part of the Attack action (no Bonus Action).

shortbow.name: Shortbow
shortbow.masteryEff: Hit + damage: Advantage on your next attack vs the target.

shortsword.name: Shortsword
shortsword.masteryEff: Hit + damage: Advantage on your next attack vs the target.

spear.name: Spear
spear.masteryEff: Hit + damage: target has Disadvantage on its next attack.

warhammer.name: Warhammer
warhammer.masteryEff: Hit + damage: push a Large-or-smaller target 10 ft away.
